_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in determining an appropriate level of test rigor for a given system.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for transformation logic, integration tests for pipeline components, and data validation tests using appropriate testing frameworks.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-004 (RM, cosine: 0.475), RM-A-001 (RM, cosine: 0.464).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.523). Shared vocabulary: [appropriate, skill]. DCWF-only terms [determining, given, level, rigor, system, test] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, automated, components, data, frameworks, integration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.901, R=0.869). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.6%). "Skill in determining an appropriate level of test rigor for a given system." and "Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.522 ≈ STS 0.523 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [appropriate, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [appropriate, skill]. DCWF-only: [determining, given, level, rigor, system, test]. WIDAI-only: [applications, automated, components, data, frameworks, integration].
